# terrible_community_crypto_x509_certificate_pipe (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `provider` (String) Name of the provider to use to generate/retrieve the OpenSSL certificate. The `entrust` provider has been removed from community.crypto 3.0.0 due to sunsetting of the ECS API.

### Optional

- `content` (String) The existing certificate.

### Read-Only

- `certificate` (String) The (current or generated) certificate's content.
